evidence.snippet:
Reliable On-Time Delivery of Your Composite Parts
*   Receive your composite products on time! Our production team is dedicated to on-time delivery, and we consistently achieve 100% on-time delivery ratings from our customers.
*   Receive the fastest response time from the composite industry. Our typical production through-put time is less than 2 weeks.

readiness.notes: ISO 9001:2015 certified serial production with on-time delivery focus, JIT delivery, and typical throughput under 2 weeks.

tagline: Manufactures custom carbon-fiber and fiberglass composite structures—cases, fairings, battery trays, tooling—primarily for transportation and industrial OEMs. ISO 9001:2015 certified, in production. Notable: High Performance Drone Box for DoD contractor. NDAA compliance status undisclosed; no Blue UAS certification found. Public evidence limited to commercial portfolio; defense-sector involvement unclear beyond single named drone product.
